title: Blackspur - Mini Carbon Steel Combination Pliers - 11.5cm - Black
features: These mini combination pliers are manufactured from heat treated carbon steel with a spring release mechanism for easy use, anti-slip grips for safety & reinforced cutting edge.
They are ideal for bending wire, crafts & general DIY use.
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
